title: Hard Worlds
body:
Introducing our groundbreaking Minecraft plugin, meticulously designed to exponentially elevate the difficulty of survival within the Minecraft universe. This sophisticated enhancement is tailored explicitly for seasoned players who have already achieved mastery over essential survival strategies and skills. By integrating complex challenges and nuanced survival elements, this plugin ensures that even the most adept and experienced Minecraft enthusiasts will encounter a renewed sense of adventure and formidable trials. Embark on this extraordinary journey where your expertise will be rigorously tested, fostering an exhilarating and unparalleled gaming experience.

Features of the HardWorlds Plugin

Challenging Environmental Conditions:

Severe Weather Phenomena: Expect unrelenting thunderstorms with frequent lightning strikes during nighttime or during stormy conditions, dramatically intensifying the environmental hazards players face.

Extreme Heat: Intermittent episodes of intense heat inflict damage and impose debilitating effects on players, such as Weakness and Slowness, significantly heightening the survival challenge.

Augmented Mob Spawning:

Elevated Spawn Rates: Experience heightened spawn rates of hostile mobs, especially during nighttime or in specific biomes, increasing the threat level considerably.

Enhanced Mob Characteristics: Mobs appear with augmented health, speed, and damage, and are often equipped with superior gear, making encounters substantially more perilous.

Custom Mobs and Advanced AI:

Special Abilities: Mobs are endowed with unique abilities such as invisibility, speed enhancements, and poison effects, adding an unpredictable element to engagements.

Sophisticated AI: Mobs exhibit advanced behaviors, including targeting players from greater distances and summoning reinforcements, thereby requiring more strategic player responses.

Restricted Inventory and Storage:

Encumbered Movement: Players burdened with over 2000 items suffer a Slowness effect, significantly reducing their movement speed and necessitating careful inventory management.

Custom Events:

Manual Event Control: Administrators can manually start, stop, and list custom events using the /customevents command, providing direct control over event dynamics.

Automated Event Scheduling: Custom events such as monster sieges, sudden lava pocket appearances, cobweb entanglements, and temporary buffs or debuffs are automatically scheduled, ensuring continuous engagement and unpredictability.

Performance Optimization:

Entity Management: Regularly purges excess mobs and items to prevent server overload, maintaining optimal performance and reducing lag.

Chunk Management: Unloads inactive chunks to conserve memory and CPU usage, ensuring efficient resource allocation.

Load Reduction: Temporarily disables mob AI during peak times and limits the number of entities processed per tick, significantly reducing server load.

Command Reference:

/customevents:

start <event>: Initiate a specified custom event manually.
stop <event>: Terminate a specified custom event.
list: Display all registered and currently active custom events.
Permissions:

customevents.use: Grants players the ability to use the /customevents command (default: op).
customevents.start: Allows players to initiate custom events (default: op).
customevents.stop: Permits players to terminate custom events (default: op).
customevents.list: Enables players to list custom events (default: true).
Event Types:

Monster Siege: Summons numerous mobs around players, creating an immersive siege scenario.
Lava Pockets: Randomly generates lava pockets around players, introducing sudden environmental hazards.
Cobwebs: Spawns cobwebs around players to entangle and impede their movement.
Temporary Buffs: Applies beneficial potion effects such as Increased Damage and Speed to players.
Temporary Debuffs: Inflicts negative potion effects like Weakness and Slowness on players, increasing the challenge.
